name: Video - Setup and configure Loyalty
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this video, we show you how to set up and configure Loyalty for your customers within Retail Express, including the ability to accrue and redeem loyalty points. You can even automatically assign different price groups to your customers as they accrue points."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "As of January 2020, a new Loyalty Expiration feature has been added. Refer to the Settings - Loyalty Configuration article for more information."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "iframe", "url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/177652585?title=0&byline=0&portrait=0", "frameAttributes": {"width": "700", "height": "400"}, "embedData": {"url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/177652585?title=0&byline=0&portrait=0", "embedType": "iframe", "name": "", "width": "700", "height": "400"}}]
